name: Guidelines on Safety Management of Medical Information Systems
acronym: MHLW Medical Info Systems Safety Guidelines
owner: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, Japan (MHLW)
description: Version 7.0, revised June 2026. Published as 5 companion volumes: Overview, Management, Planning & Administration, System Operations, Maintenance Outsourcing. Only the Overview volume is acquired here.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/mhlw.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Issued directly by a national government ministry/agency as an official notification/circular -- plausibly excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13(2) ("notifications, instructions, circulars, and other documents similar thereto issued by national or local government organs"), but this is a less clear-cut case than primary legislation (Art. 13(1)) and has not been legally verified. Treat as moderate-confidence permitted, not certain.

current_extraction.notes: Only the Overview volume (of 5) was downloaded and extracted, given time constraints -- Japanese only, no English version exists. The source listing page (mhlw-medical-page-listing.txt) records the PDF URLs for all 5 volumes for a future pass.

scope.notes: 1 of 5 volumes acquired (Overview). Management, Planning & Administration, System Operations, and Maintenance Outsourcing volumes still TODO -- URLs recorded.
